kill_fact: No kill_fact breaks the PASS. The bear-tilted PASS (C, conviction 2, 'great-company-bad-entry, watchlist-for-washout') survives every primary-source attack: Q1-26 rev $7.87B/+26%, adj EPS $2.68/+51%, record backlog $48.5B, raised FY26 guide, the AEP 765kV partnership (Nov 5 2025), net debt ~$5.5B, ~152M shares, price ~$702-719 (ATH $785 May-26), and forward P/E ~52-54x ALL verify. The thesis that the AI-grid optionality is fully pre-paid on a ~52x / ~8.5%-ROIC contractor that has already run, and that PWR is the LEAST resolution-driver-independent add to an AI-capex-saturated basket, holds. BUT one load-bearing bear number is FALSE (see corrections) — it makes the name LESS unattractive than the debate states, not more, so it cannot upgrade the conviction but it must be fixed.
corrections: STALE FCF ANCHOR (load-bearing, factually wrong): The bear_thesis, consensus_delta, valley_of_death and interrogator_dossier all assert FY26 free-cash-flow guidance is 'just ~$500M' implying a 'sub-0.5% FCF yield' and that 'growth is consuming working capital so FCF does not inflect.' PRIMARY SOURCE (Quanta Q1-26 press release / 8-K, 2026-04-30) states FY26 FCF guidance is $1.55B-$2.05B (op cash flow $2.35B-$2.85B) — the $500M was a stale INITIAL guide that was superseded. Real FCF yield at ~$108B mcap is ~1.6-1.7% (≈3.5x the bear figure), and ~$1.8B FCF midpoint is GROWTH over FY25's $1.67B, NOT a working-capital-consuming decline. The 'FCF overstates distributable cash / sub-0.5% yield' pillar of the bear case collapses. The PASS still stands on VALUATION (~52x fwd P/E, ~30-40% above ~$505 base SoP) and resolution-driver-independence — but the cash-economics argument must be re-stated at the correct ~1.6% yield, which materially softens the bear. MINOR: net debt is ~$5.5B (file says ~$6B); share count ~152M (file ~150M) — both immaterial.
evidence: Quanta Services, 'Quanta Services Reports First Quarter 2026 Results,' PRNewswire/company 8-K, 2026-04-30: Q1-26 revenue $7.87B (vs $6.23B, +26.3%), GAAP $1.45/dil sh, adjusted diluted EPS $2.68 (+50.6%), record backlog $48.5B; FY26 guidance revenue $34.7-35.2B, adj EPS $13.55-14.25, adj EBITDA $3.49-3.65B, and FREE CASH FLOW $1.55-2.05B / operating cash flow $2.35-2.85B (refutes the ~$500M FCF anchor).

AEP & Quanta Services, 'AEP and Quanta Services Announce Strategic Partnership to Advance Transmission and Power Infrastructure,' PRNewswire / aep.com, 2025-11-05: long-term Cooperation & Commitment Agreement on 765kV/HV transmission EPC plus a Development Services Agreement to expand domestic transformer/circuit-breaker manufacturing, supporting AEP's $72B capital plan incl. data-center load — verifies the marquee catalyst already fired Nov-2025.

stockanalysis.com / Q1-26 10-Q balance sheet (Mar 31 2026): total debt ~$5.89B, cash ~$365M → net debt ~$5.5B; total equity $9.14B — corroborates the ~$6B net-debt / ~1.45x leverage frame (no net cash, no special-situation overlay).

GuruFocus / FinanceCharts, June 2026: PWR forward P/E ~52-54x; price ~$702-719 with ATH $785 (2026-05-06) — confirms the name has already run and the AI-grid optionality is the most pre-paid of the GRID EPC cohort.
